_comment: Orchestrator (PRG-06 Identity Cutover + Bug Lane) watcher set. Durable record of EXPECTED monitors; reconcile vs live /tasks at session-start/post-compact/post-resume per clacks/monitor-hygiene.md. Background tasks are job-scoped (job cd122717) and survive context compaction, so do NOT blind re-arm — the backstop firing post-compaction confirmed infra is live. Verify by direct-read at decision boundaries.

monitors.purpose: catch WS-18 merge-flags (#1647), consult-answers, status; high-water prg06ic-361
catch bug-lane flags (#1645 rebase/merge), status; high-water bug-lane-096
catch reviewer Stage transitions / bounces. LABELS UNRELIABLE — always direct-query verify the WI before acting
RETIRED — fired post-compaction with 'settled=fail' (expected: main red until #1647 fix lands). #1645 stays parked for main-green; no re-arm needed.
monitors.command: poll gh pr checks 1645 until main settles (one-shot)
